title: Vareth
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Criminal |image=[[File:Vareth.jpg]] |name=Vareth |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]]''[[Galaxy Guide 7: Mos Eisley]]'' |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Female]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation= |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Of course. Except my friend here is a Sullustan. When it comes to tunnels they have a photographic memory. Shall we try this again? My name is Vareth.''"
"''Greetings, sly one. I am Bib Fortuna. You appear adequate to the task.|Vareth and Bib Fortuna|{{WEGCite|story=Finding Work|book=Galaxy Guide 7: Mos Eisley}}}} '''Vareth''' was a short female [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] under the employment of crime lord [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]]. ==Biography== Vareth worked with the male [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] [[Garron]]. Garron used his recently deceased parents' life insurance in the purchase of the [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] ''[[Startled Circuit]]''. They made their way to Tatooine, and Jabba's [[Majordomo/Legends|majordomo]] [[Bib Fortuna/Legends|Bib Fortuna]] was impressed enough with Vareth and Garron's skills that he offered them employment as spacers in the Hutt's criminal organization. ==Appearances== *{{WEGCite|story=Finding Work|book=Galaxy Guide 7: Mos Eisley}} {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[Galaxy Guide 7: Mos Eisley]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Females]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Pilots]] [[Category:Spacers]]
